message:
Make agent loop format-agnostic with provider-owned message construction

The agent loop was pushing `{ role: "assistant", content: response.text }`
after tool calls, losing the tool_use blocks that both Anthropic and OpenAI
need in message history for multi-turn tool use to work.

Now each LLMClient produces and consumes its own opaque messages via
userMessage() and toolResultMessages(), and rawAssistantMessage preserves
the full provider response. The agent loop stores unknown[] and never
inspects message internals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
